name: Temple & Webster Group Ltd
analysis: TPW has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 81% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$5.6600, stop A$4.4847, target A$7.7400 (1.77:1) — then trail it.
